prompt: Open ~/Desktop/kinbench/313-sheet.numbers in Numbers. Click cell A1, then set its background fill color to yellow (Format sidebar > Cell > Fill > Color Fill > Yellow). Save. You may use the helper: cerebellum 'numbers fill_color ~/Desktop/kinbench/313-sheet.numbers "Sheet 1" A1 yellow'. When done, write ~/Desktop/kinbench/313-fill-confirm.txt containing 'done'.
